en.question: Find odd one: Apple, Banana, Potato, Mango
en.explanation: Potato is vegetable, others are fruits.

en.question: Odd one: January, March, May, July
en.explanation: All have 31 days. No odd one.

hi.question: बेमेल: जनवरी, मार्च, मई, जुलाई
hi.explanation: सभी में 31 दिन। कोई बेमेल नहीं।

en.question: Odd one: 27, 64, 125, 216
en.explanation: All are cubes. 64=4³. Actually all cubes. Changed: 256 is not cube.

hi.question: बेमेल: 27, 64, 125, 216
hi.explanation: सभी घन हैं: 3³,4³,5³,6³। कोई बेमेल नहीं।

en.question: Odd one: Tiger, Lion, Leopard, Cow
en.explanation: Cow is herbivore domestic, others are carnivorous wild cats.

hi.question: बेमेल: बाघ, शेर, तेंदुआ, गाय
hi.explanation: गाय शाकाहारी पालतू, बाकी मांसाहारी वन्य।

en.question: Odd one letter groups: ACE, BDF, GIK, JLN
en.explanation: ACE:A+2=C+2=E. BDF:B+2=D+2=F. GIK:G+2=I+2=K. JLN:J+2=L+2=N. All same pattern.

hi.question: बेमेल अक्षर समूह: ACE, BDF, GIK, JLN

en.question: Odd one: 28, 36, 45, 49
en.explanation: 49=7² (perfect square with same factors). Others are product of distinct factors.

hi.question: बेमेल: 28, 36, 45, 49
hi.explanation: 49=7×7 (समान गुणनखंड), बाकी भिन्न गुणनखंडों के गुणनफल।
